hero.badge: Workspace-first · Local execution · BYO agent CLI
hero.title: A desktop workspace for modern dev flow
hero.tagline: Keep context, execution, and agent workflows in one place
hero.desc: Built for developers who work across repos, terminals, and agent CLIs. Yishan helps reduce reset cost between sessions by keeping the right project state close to the work.
agents.label: Works with agents
agents.title: Bring your own agent stack
agents.desc: Yishan works alongside the agent tools developers already use, instead of forcing a closed runtime or a brand new workflow.
pillars.0.title: Workspace continuity
pillars.0.desc: Keep context, next steps, and project state attached to the work instead of reconstructing it every session.
pillars.1.title: Local-first execution
pillars.1.desc: Run terminal, git, filesystem, and agent workflows close to the machine where development actually happens.
pillars.2.title: Bring your own agents
pillars.2.desc: Use the CLIs you already trust and let Yishan sit above them as the workspace layer.
product.label: Product direction
product.title: Closer to a real dev environment
product.desc: Yishan keeps the interface dark and tool-like, aligning the palette with the product identity rather than drifting into a separate design system.
cards.0.title: A stable place for work to live
cards.0.desc: Repos, notes, task context, and execution trails stay aligned so work remains resumable.
cards.1.title: Closer to the real dev environment
cards.1.desc: Yishan is built for actual engineering workflows, not isolated AI chat sessions.
cards.2.title: Lower reset cost between sessions
cards.2.desc: Switch tasks, return later, and keep enough project state to continue without reloading everything into your head.
workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.title: Keep real development work moving
workflow.desc: Yishan is designed for multi-step engineering work that needs context, execution, and continuity to stay connected.
workflow.0.title: Open a workspace
workflow.0.desc: Start from a repo, a task, or an existing workstream with a stable home for context.
workflow.1.title: Connect local execution
workflow.1.desc: Work with your terminal, repo, and preferred agent CLI without replacing your stack.
workflow.2.title: Resume cleanly
workflow.2.desc: Continue with the current state, recent activity, and next moves already attached to the work.
cta.label: Get started
cta.title: Built for developers who want less fragmentation
cta.desc: Keep context closer to the work, make sessions more resumable, and let agent workflows fit real project environments.
footer.desc: Built for developers who want less fragmentation, lower reset cost, and a calmer way to work with agents.
